role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Focused exclusively on script identification (Hangul) and romanization conventions.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Analyzed terrain, vegetation types, and settlement density.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Identified specific plant species (Pinus densiflora, Cycas revoluta) and their biogeography.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road signs, markings, and utility pole safety standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain evidence, specifically identifying the LS Tractor brand and pole safety wraps.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All five agents correctly identified South Korea as the primary candidate with high confidence, supported by distinct visual evidence (Hangul signs, LS Tractor, specific pole markings). The tournament correctly resolved the minor Japan vs. South Korea ambiguity in favor of the truth.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately cited visible Hangul text and Romanization.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Correctly described the rural agricultural setting and vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified visible pine and cycad species.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Accurately described the blue street sign and yellow/black pole markings.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly identified the LS Tractor brand and pole safety features.
